unit.name: WP_HTTP_Response object state behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 wp-includes/class-wp-http-response.php in isolated PHP CLI probes with a deterministic absint stub. It observes constructor data/status/header initialization, absint status coercion, get/set data and headers, single-header replace behavior, single-header append behavior when replace=false, direct jsonSerialize handoff to current response data, and json_encode public-property serialization without claiming REST server dispatch, Requests transport integration, live HTTP behavior, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass REST dispatch, Requests bridge, installed HTTP routes, selected upstream HTTP/REST PHPUnit, and ecosystem fixtures before claiming public PHP ownership.
